---
title: "Roadmap"
---

How every module depends on the others. Blue nodes are reusable
[foundations](../../foundations/README.md) modules shared across courses; arrows mean
"needed for".

Like every course, this one assumes the notation grammar in
[reading-math-notation](../../foundations/reading-math-notation/lesson.qmd) — take it
first if the symbols aren't yet second nature.

```{mermaid}
flowchart TD
    classDef foundation fill:#e8f0fe,stroke:#4285f4

    F1["derivative-as-slope<br/>(measure a slope numerically)"]:::foundation
    F2["vectors-and-summation<br/>(x_i, n, Σ, a vector of numbers)"]:::foundation
    F3["partial-derivatives-and-the-gradient<br/>(∂f/∂a, ∇f, numeric gradient)"]:::foundation
    M1["01 · Rolling downhill<br/>(x ← x − α f′(x), the learning rate)"]
    M2["02 · The gradient<br/>(∇f applied: the descent step in vector form)"]
    M3["03 · Fitting a line by descent<br/>(MSE bowl, matches a real optimizer)"]
    M4["04 · Capstone<br/>(decode optim() / scipy.minimize)"]

    F1 --> M1
    F1 --> F3
    F2 --> F3
    F3 --> M2
    M1 --> M2
    M2 --> M3
    M3 --> M4
```

## Suggested order

1. Foundation: [derivative-as-slope](../../foundations/derivative-as-slope/lesson.qmd) —
   new? take it fully; done before? skim its pronunciation table.
2. Foundation: [vectors-and-summation](../../foundations/vectors-and-summation/lesson.qmd) —
   same rule.
3. Foundation: [partial-derivatives-and-the-gradient](../../foundations/partial-derivatives-and-the-gradient/lesson.qmd) —
   same rule; builds on the two above.
4. [01 · Rolling downhill](modules/01-rolling-downhill/lesson.qmd)
   (+ [practice](modules/01-rolling-downhill/practice.qmd))
5. [02 · The gradient](modules/02-the-gradient/lesson.qmd)
   (+ [practice](modules/02-the-gradient/practice.qmd))
6. [03 · Fitting a line by descent](modules/03-fitting-a-line-by-descent/lesson.qmd)
   (+ [practice](modules/03-fitting-a-line-by-descent/practice.qmd))
7. [04 · Capstone — decode a real optimizer](modules/04-capstone-decode-the-optimizer/lesson.qmd)
   (+ [practice](modules/04-capstone-decode-the-optimizer/practice.qmd))

After each lesson, do its practice page before moving on — the problems are the part that
makes it stick. External videos/posts for each module: [resources](resources.md).
